title: [v4.8] Fix wsl.conf generation when user-mode-networking is disabled
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #20798

/assign n1hility

```release-note
Fixed a bug on Windows (WSL) where wsl.conf/resolv.conf was not restored when user-mode networking was disabled after being enabled.
```
